title: Otis Worldwide: Shareholder Value Is Eventually Going To The Top Floor
text: Otis Worldwide has an impressive 13.8% average quarterly return on capital. Net margins have been slowly rising, and have reached 9.89% in the most recent quarter.

title: Otis (OTIS) Q1 Earnings & Sales Beat Estimates, View Solid
text: Solid operational improvement, organic sales growth and a lower share count boost Otis Worldwide's (OTIS) Q1 earnings.

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.80 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.74 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.77 per share a year ago.

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) to Post Tepid Q1 Earnings: Here's Why
text: Otis Worldwide's (OTIS) first-quarter results are expected to reflect the adverse impacts of inflation.

title: OTIS' Product Innovation & Services Business to Drive Growth

title: KBR's K-Green Technology Selected for Atlas Agro's Plants
text: KBR boosts its backlog with a new contract from Atlas Agro for the green ammonia project in multiple green nitrate plants.

title: 4 Stocks to Buy From a Thriving Building Products Industry
text: Although supply-chain issues and rising input prices are concerns for the Zacks Building Products - Miscellaneous industry, focus on operational efficiencies and higher government spending raise hopes for OTIS, URI, SSD and IBP.
